text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has come once again. This time last
year, King Halo was in the midst of the Classic
Triple Crown tour, but now she's focused only on
her own path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week approaches and asks which race
King Halo plans to run in next, but the
conversation is interrupted and the two promise
to speak again later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps a new fire has been lit by their paths
diverging. In any case, they remain rivals.
